name: Ashes and Grain
description: The Hollow Hand wants Lord Ashworth's grain silo destroyed. The price is right, but the cost may be higher than gold.

AVAILABLE.journal_entry: A man named Fenrick approached me with an offer from the Hollow Hand.

ACTIVE.journal_entry: I've agreed to burn Lord Ashworth's granary for the Hollow Hand. Fenrick gave me a firebomb. I need to plant it during the guard shift change at night.
objectives: Plant the firebomb during the guard shift change

REPORT_PATH.journal_entry: I know the Guild's plan to burn the granary. I could report this to the guards... or use this knowledge to my advantage.

COMPLETED_ARSON.journal_entry: The silo burns. The Guild is pleased. Ashvale's last grain reserve is ash. What have I done?

BETRAYED_GUILD.journal_entry: I reported the Guild's plan to the Ashvale Guard. The granary is safe, but I've made dangerous enemies.

COMPLETED_BLACKMAIL.journal_entry: I used the Guild's plan as leverage against Fenrick. He'll think twice before crossing me again. But both sides now distrust me.

FAILED_CAUGHT.journal_entry: The guards caught me at the granary. My reputation is ruined, and the Guild won't protect me.

FAILED_CONTACT_DEAD.journal_entry: Fenrick is dead. The Guild's sabotage plan dies with him — unless another agent picks up the contract. I still have the firebomb.

ACTIVE_NEW_CONTACT.journal_entry: A new Guild agent has arrived to pick up where Fenrick left off. The sabotage plan is back on — but this one doesn't smile. This one doesn't care about children.
objectives: Decide whether to proceed with the original plan

ABANDONED_DESTROYED.journal_entry: I destroyed the firebomb. The Guild's plan is dead — truly dead this time. Whatever happens to the granary, it won't be by my hand.
